segments.text: Once again Jesus entered the synagogue, and a man with a withered hand was there.
In order to accuse Jesus, they were watching to see if He would heal on the Sabbath.
Then Jesus said to the man with the withered hand,
St and up among us.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And He asked them,
Which is lawful on the Sabbath: to do good or to do evil, to save life or to destroy it?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But they were silent.
Jesus looked around at them with anger and sorrow at their hardness of heart. Then He said to the man,
Stretch out your hand.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: So he stretched it out, and it was restored.
At this, the Pharisees went out and began plotting with the Herodians how they might kill Jesus.
So Jesus withdrew with His disciples to the sea, accompanied by a large crowd from Galilee, Judea,
Jerusalem, Idumea, the region beyond the Jordan, and the vicinity of Tyre and Sidon. The large crowd came to Him when they heard what great things He was doing.
Jesus asked His disciples to have a boat ready for Him so that the crowd would not crush Him.
For He had healed so many that all who had diseases were pressing forward to touch Him.
And when the unclean spirits saw Him, they fell down before Him and cried out,
You are the Son of God!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But He warned them sternly not to make Him known.
Then Jesus went up on the mountain and called for those He wanted, and they came to Him.
He appointed twelve of them, whom He designated as apostles,[^15] to accompany Him, to be sent out to preach,
and to have authority to drive out demons.
These are the twelve He appointed: Simon (whom He named Peter),
James son of Zebedee and his brother John (whom He named Boanerges, meaning
Sons of Thunder
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Andrew, Philip, Bartholomew, Matthew, Thomas, James son of Alphaeus, Thaddaeus, Simon the Zealot,[^16]
and Judas Iscariot, who betrayed Jesus.[^17]
Then Jesus went home,[^18] and once again a crowd gathered, so that He and His disciples could not even eat.
When His family heard about this, they went out to take custody of Him, saying,
He is out of His mind.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And the scribes who had come down from Jerusalem were saying,
He is possessed by Beelzebul,[^19]
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: and,
By the prince of the demons He drives out demons.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: So Jesus called them together and began to speak to them in parables:
How can Satan drive out Satan?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If a kingdom is divided against itself, it cannot st and.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If a house is divided against itself, it cannot st and.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And if Satan is divided and rises against himself, he cannot st and; his end has come.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text:
Indeed, no one can enter a strong man’s house to steal his possessions unless he first ties up the strong man. Then he can plunder his house.

## The Unpardonable Sin
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Truly I tell you, the sons of men will be forgiven all sins and blasphemies, as many as they utter.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But whoever blasphemes against the Holy Spirit will never be forgiven; he is guilty of eternal sin.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus made this statement because they were saying,
He has an unclean spirit.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then Jesus’ mother and brothers came and stood outside. They sent someone in to summon Him,
and a crowd was sitting around Him.
Look,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: He was told,
Your mother and brothers[^20] are outside, asking for You.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: But Jesus replied,
Who are My mother and My brothers?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Looking at those seated in a circle around Him, He said,
Here are My mother and My brothers!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For whoever does the will of God is My brother and sister and mother.
segments.speaker: Jesus
